title: crotalaria nitens
intro: Crotalaria nitens is a plant species that belongs to the legume family, known for its bright yellow flowers and slender stems. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria nitens include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
